log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Human — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Human — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Human — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Human — Unarmored Caster HP: 49/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 10 damage. Human — Unarmored Caster HP: 39/67
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Human — Unarmored Caster HP: 26/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Human — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 26/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Human — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Human — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Human — Unarmored Caster HP: 8/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Human — Unarmored Caster HP: -10/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Human — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
